title: if ... else if constructs should have else clauses
description: "if ... else if" constructs should end with "else" clausesAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellbased-on-misracertWhy is this an issue?More InfoThis rule applies whenever anifstatement is followed by one or moreelse ifstatements; the finalelse ifshould be followed by anelsestatement.The requirement for a finalelsestatement is defensive programming.Theelsestatement should either take appropriate action or contain a suitable comment as to why no action is taken. This is consistent with the requirement to have a finaldefaultclause in aswitchstatement.Noncompliant code exampleif (x == 0) { doSomething(); } else if (x == 1) { doSomethingElse(); }Compliant solutionif (x == 0) { doSomething(); } else if (x == 1) { doSomethingElse(); } else { error(); }ExceptionsWhen all br
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: if ... else if constructs should have else clauses. Add a final else clause for defensive programming.
Incomplete if-else if chain detected. Add a final else clause to handle all possible cases.
Missing final else clause in if-else if construct. Consider adding an else block for complete case coverage.
